detail: Windows remediation evidence: cargo test -p session-api passed 106 tests; cargo test -p session-api -p session-cli -p session-mcp passed 124 tests; cargo fmt --check -p session-api passed. Regressions cover aged live lock exclusion, stable ownership-safe release, deterministic finish versus mutation/init/resume, finished plain-init byte stability, and failed Windows replacement preserving previous bytes. Workspace-wide cargo fmt --check remains blocked by unrelated pre-existing formatting drift outside session-api.
